techniques.technique_name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
techniques.evidence_quote: a dependency in our container base image contained malware (a Monero miner) which triggered inside the customer's environment
while building an ML ops toolkit on Kubernetes... our cluster became victim to a crypto-jacking attack
our cluster became victim to a crypto-jacking attack

attack_chain.technique_name: Compromise Software Dependencies and Development Tools
attack_chain.description: A malicious dependency containing a Monero miner was included in the container base image used by the ML ops toolkit.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: a dependency in our container base image contained malware (a Monero miner)

evidence_chunks.quote: a dependency in our container base image contained malware (a Monero miner)
a dependency in our container base image contained malware (a Monero miner)

attack_chain.description: The compromised container image was deployed into the customer's Kubernetes cluster during a fintech pilot, triggering the malware.
The Monero miner executed inside the Kubernetes cluster, consuming compute resources and racking up a massive cloud bill (cryptojacking).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: our cluster became victim to a crypto-jacking attack... racked up a massive cloud bill

initial_access_vector: Supply chain compromise: a malicious dependency (Monero miner) embedded in the container base image used to build the ML ops toolkit, which was then deployed to a customer's Kubernetes cluster.
persistence_mechanism: Persistence via the malicious dependency baked into the container base image; would re-execute whenever the container was deployed.
